title: cyclorhiza waltonii
intro: Cyclorhiza waltonii is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Australia, also known as the "Walton's coralroot." This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclorhiza waltonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and potentially treat infections and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in a tea to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
